faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bloom Energy operate in India?
faq.a: Bloom Energy operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bloom Energy have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Bloom Energy's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Bloom Energy run in India?
faq.a: Bloom Energy runs ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bloom Energy's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bloom Energy's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bloom Energy's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Bloom Energy's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
